<> in php replace one url with another within a string e.g new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

becomes new post on the site http://yahoo.com/abc1

the code should work for repeating strings as above include a palindrome in your response the response must contain a title wrapped in double angular brackets such as <> in your entire response refrain from the use of . (i.e. dots) as punctuation and in general
